name: PharmAgent
type: DKG v10 Working Memory and Shared Memory integration
theme: Clinical pharmacist LLM-wiki / autoresearch workflow over verifiable drug-therapy guidance
summary: PharmAgent turns pharmacist case narratives and local guideline excerpts into copy-paste clinical notes. Parsed PDF guidance is converted to JSON-LD/RDF, staged into DKG v10 working/shared memory, retrieved by RAG, and used by an OpenClaw OAuth-backed LLM to draft evidence-grounded notes with refusal when local knowledge is missing.

memoryLayers.workingMemory: Per-session pharmacist case text and optional attachment metadata are used transiently for generation.
memoryLayers.sharedMemory: Validated PharmAgent JSON-LD guideline excerpts are staged to did:dkg:context-graph:PharmAgent/_shared_memory.
memoryLayers.verifiedMemoryRoadmap: Human-reviewed guideline assets can be promoted to verified memory/on-chain DKG once DKG v10 publish review is enabled for this context graph. The staging script supports --publish when the daemon/curator flow is ready.

agentIntegration.workflow: retrieve local DKG-backed evidence, call OpenClaw agent, return four-section pharmacist note

safety.clinicalJudgment: Output is documentation support and does not replace pharmacist judgment.
safety.noEvidencePolicy: If local evidence retrieval returns no relevant records, PharmAgent refuses to produce a clinical recommendation.
safety.humanReview: Generated JSON-LD clinical source excerpts are marked needsHumanReview=true and reviewStatus=human_review.
